author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. vexp_f32 — vectorizable exp polynomial using range reduction (x / ln2 → integer part + remainder) + degree-5 Horner polynomial + bit-manipulation 2^n scaling. No branches in hot path. LLVM auto-vectorizes to AVX2/SSE.
2. vlog_f32 — vectorizable ln using mantissa normalization to [sqrt(2)/2, sqrt(2)) + atanh series (2*s*(1 + s²/3 + s⁴/5 + s⁶/7 + s⁸/9)). Sub-1-ULP accuracy.
3. fast_exp rewritten to use vexp_f32 loop instead of ferray-ufunc scalar dispatch
4. fast_log added, wired into transcendental::log CPU path
5. Both support rayon parallelism for large tensors (>= 2M elements)
6. All 837 core + 6 integration tests pass
